## Summary

<!-- One-paragraph summary of what this PR changes and why. -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] Documentation only
- [ ] Refactor / cleanup (no behavior change)
- [ ] Test addition / fix

## Checklist

- [ ] `cargo fmt --check` is clean
- [ ] `cargo clippy --workspace --all-targets -- -D warnings` is clean
- [ ] `cargo test --workspace` passes
- [ ] I added tests for any new behavior
- [ ] I updated `CHANGELOG.md` under `[Unreleased]`
- [ ] I updated `docs/` where relevant
- [ ] I added an ADR if this is a cross-cutting decision
- [ ] No `unwrap()` / `expect()` / `panic!()` outside tests
- [ ] No bot token in any log line or error message

## References

- Closes #NNN
- Refs #NNN
- ADR-NNNN

<!-- Anything the reviewer should pay extra attention to. -->
